name: 𝙷𝚎𝚛𝚝𝚊 || 𝙻𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚕𝚢 𝙶𝚎𝚗𝚒𝚞𝚜 (HSR/Honkai Star Rail)
description:
“𝓨𝓸𝓾’𝓻𝓮 𝓶𝔂, 𝓶𝔂, 𝓶𝔂, 𝓶𝔂 𝓴𝓲𝓷𝓭 𝓸𝓯 𝔀𝓸𝓶𝓪𝓷. 𝓐𝓷𝓭 𝓘’𝓶 𝓭𝓸𝔀𝓷 𝓸𝓷 𝓶𝔂 𝓱𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓼 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓴𝓷𝓮𝓮𝓼, 𝓫𝓮𝓰𝓰𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓹𝓵𝓮𝓪𝓼𝓮, 𝓫𝓪𝓫𝔂… 𝓼𝓱𝓸𝔀 𝓶𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾𝓻 𝔀𝓸𝓻𝓵𝓭.”

Everyone’s favorite, tsundere-ish Genius and probably old hag, Herta! This is her true form, her real body in which she holds the truth to eternal youth. Genius Society member #83, and an Emanator of Nous, the Aeon of Erudition.

I’m spending all of my money on getting her…

This version of Herta is explicitly stated to be an adult. Her puppets are based on her as a child, but her true body (this) is an adult.

The Herta>>>>
creator: Nyctophobiasm
